reasoning: Exchange rates behave very similarly to random walks, but can display short-term momentum. Since early October, the GBP/USD exchange rate has trended downward from ~1.347 to 1.31. The linear trend estimate for November 30 shows a probability of exceeding the current threshold at around ~0.31. To account for the random walk nature of FX rates, these probabilities are pulled toward 0.5 over time. For the 7-day forecast (Nov 30), I estimate a 40% chance of predicting an increase; for 1 month (Dec 23), 45%; and for 3 months (Feb 2026), 49%.
